title: Sini's additions
description:
Semi-vanilla fabric mod, 
Adds Tools, Materials, Armors, New Craft Station.
body:
**Semi-vanilla Fabric mod**,   
Adds Tools, Materials, Armors, New Craft Station.

#### Vanilla crafts in Crafting Table you can look in **JEI**

## **Requires** [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

At the moment, there are not as many mods on Fabric as on Forge,  
My mod adds witherite, obsidian, copper, mushroom tools and armor, as well as a small Easter egg on Minecraft brother, it's very easy to find, just look in the creative tab or craft in game.  
The mod also adds a scuba gear helmet to make swimming in the sea even more exciting and longer.  
Witherite is a multi-tool that will allow you to dig up all the blocks with impressive speed.  
Witherite axe that digs any wood 3x3  
Witherite sword, which with a 90% chance puts a wither effect on any entity when hit.  
Witherite armor has great strength and no less great protection.

## **CRAFTS IN MONUMENT IN GALLERY**
P.S Sorry for my bad English
P.SS Mod will still be finalized
